title: Raccoon Removal in Eastchester, Westchester | $900 - $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Eastchester, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Licensed experts serving Eastchester homes & businesses. Call today!
intro: Dealing with raccoons in your Eastchester home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Eastchester and Westchester County. Our experienced technicians use humane, effective methods to safely remove raccoons and prevent future infestations in this charming suburban community.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife control experience to Eastchester residents, with same-day emergency services and licensed, insured technicians who understand the unique challenges of raccoon activity in Westchester's suburban neighborhoods. We provide complete solutions from removal to exclusion work and attic restoration, with transparent pricing and guaranteed results.
localContext: Eastchester's beautiful tree-lined streets, historic homes, and proximity to wooded areas like Twin Lakes Park create ideal conditions for raccoon activity, especially in attics, chimneys, and garages of the area's many single-family residences. The neighborhood's mature landscaping and spacious properties near California Road and White Plains Road often attract raccoons searching for shelter and food sources.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Eastchester?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Eastchester typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, accessibility of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. Simple single-raccoon removals are on the lower end, while extensive attic cleanup, multiple animals, or significant exclusion work increases costs. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Eastchester properties.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Eastchester neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Eastchester due to the area's combination of wooded parks, mature trees, and residential properties with accessible food sources. They're particularly active near Twin Lakes Park, Leewood Park, and throughout neighborhoods with older homes that may have vulnerable attic vents, chimneys, or crawl spaces. Spring and fall see increased activity as raccoons seek denning sites.

faqs.question: What are signs of raccoons in my Eastchester home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include loud thumping or scratching noises in your attic or walls, especially at night, visible paw prints around your property, tipped-over garbage cans, torn soffits or damaged roof vents, and droppings near entry points. You may also notice strong odors from urine or feces, especially in attics or crawl spaces where raccoons have established a den.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to raccoon problems in Eastchester?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Eastchester raccoon removal calls, with emergency services available for urgent situations such as raccoons in living spaces or aggressive animals. Our technicians serve all Eastchester neighborhoods and can typically provide an inspection within 24 hours of your call to assess the situation and begin the removal process immediately if needed.
